parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>Die <BIBL><TITLE>Mangoldische Bibel</TITLE> <YEAR>1729</YEAR></BIBL>. Die <BIBL><TITLE>Jelische Lexicon</TITLE> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME></BIBL>, <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stettlers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Schweitzer-Chronick</TITLE></BIBL>, das <BIBL><TITLE>Reich der Todten</TITLE></BIBL>, samt noch einigen anderen neuen frantzösisch historischen Bücheren, davon der Catalogus bey Herrn M. Daniel Meyer im Collegio zu sehen ist, als welcher diese Bücher zu verkauffen in Commission hat.</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1) Wrapped "Reich der Todten" in its own <BIBL>...</BIBL> to keep bibliography items consistently tagged. 2) Closed the Stettlers entry as a standalone <BIBL> after its title, instead of letting the next title appear inside the same bibliographic block. 3) Replaced malformed character sequences (e.g., frantz\u221a\u2202sisch, B\u221a\u00bacheren, Commi- \u221a\u00fcion) with normalized forms: "frantzösisch", "Bücheren", "Commission". 4) Removed line-break hyphenation artifact in "Commi- ..." and restored the full word. 5) Normalized "Schweitzer- Chronick" to "Schweitzer-Chronick" (spacing around hyphen). 6) Added a comma after the second <BIBL> block for proper sentence structure. 7) Preserved original wording and historical orthography where possible while fixing structural XML tagging issues.
